title: seal dev-stack secrets for mentolder
description:
## Summary
- Adds the five DEV_* keys (shared-db, website-db, oauth2-proxy cookie, workspace-dev OIDC client, sish authorized_keys) to the mentolder SealedSecret so the dev.mentolder.de stack from PR #698 can actually start.
- Plaintext values live in the gitignored `environments/.secrets/mentolder.yaml`; this PR only commits the sealed manifest.

## Test plan
- [x] task env:seal ENV=mentolder (clean output, all five DEV_* keys appear under workspace-secrets.spec.encryptedData)
- [ ] After merge: `task workspace:deploy ENV=mentolder` — verify SealedSecrets controller decrypts cleanly (no `failed to decrypt` events)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
